faqs.question: What types of spiders are most common in Flatlands, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Flatlands residents most commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, and occasionally wolf spiders, particularly in homes near Marine Park or properties with basements and crawl spaces. While most local spiders are harmless, they can become a nuisance when populations grow. Our spider control service identifies the specific species in your property and applies targeted treatments to eliminate them safely and effectively.
